emails.subject: RE: estate book
emails.body: RE: estate book Dear Kam, what will this book hold? Thanks

emails.subject: RE: estate book
emails.body: There are a few deals that we have agreed to perform on 100% and Ed McMichael needs to be able to value those deals separately. KK

emails.subject: RE: estate book
emails.body: thanks. Also, is there a list of gas people (front, middle back office) that will remain with the estate? thanks

emails.subject: RE: estate book
emails.body: Bob Hall will have the mid and back office list and Ed McMichael should have the front office. KK
